h1: Custom Gift Sets & Bundles for Corporate Gifting
metaDescription: Order custom gift sets & bundles for corporate gifting, employee recognition, and events. Low MOQs, fast turnaround. Get a quote at PerfectImprints.com.
introHtml:
Custom gift sets and bundles combine multiple promotional products into a single, cohesive package. Whether you are assembling a welcome kit for new hires, a safety prize pack, or a corporate gift basket, bundling products like custom stadium cups, polypro filefolios, and personalized pens creates a higher perceived value than individual items alone. Our inventory includes a wide range of components — from drinkware and desk accessories to awards and novelties — so you can mix and match to fit your budget and brand message.

Each component can be decorated with your logo using screen printing, embroidery, laser engraving, or full-color digital print, depending on the material. Hard goods like the 24 oz stadium cup and the 16 oz Roadster Mug are ideal for screen printing or laser engraving, while soft items like the Felt Santa Hat and adult flip flops work well with embroidery. We also offer custom packaging options to elevate your gift set: choose from branded boxes, drawstring bags, or shrink wrap to keep everything organized and on-brand.

Bulk orders for gift sets typically require a minimum of 50–100 units per design, and lead times vary based on complexity. Our team can help you select compatible products, coordinate decoration methods, and manage assembly so your gift sets arrive ready to distribute. Request a quote today to start building your custom gift sets and bundles.

faqs.q: What is the minimum order quantity for custom gift sets?
faqs.a: Minimum order quantities vary by product, but most custom gift sets require at least 50–100 units per design. Some component products may have lower MOQs, allowing you to start with smaller quantities. Contact us for a specific quote based on your selected items.

faqs.q: Can I mix different products in one gift set?
faqs.a: Yes, you can mix and match any products from our catalog to create a custom gift set. Examples include pairing a 24 oz stadium cup with a pocket screwdriver or a polypro filefolio with a personalized pen. We can help you select complementary items that fit your theme and budget.

faqs.q: What decoration methods are available for gift set components?
faqs.a: Decoration options depend on the material. Hard plastic and metal items like stadium cups and tire gauges can be screen printed or laser engraved. Fabric items like adult flip flops and felt Santa hats are suitable for embroidery. Paper and cardboard items like the sticky book can be full-color digitally printed.

faqs.q: How long does production take for custom gift sets?
faqs.a: Production lead times typically range from 10 to 15 business days after artwork approval, depending on order size and decoration complexity. Assembly and packaging may add a few extra days. Rush orders are often available upon request.

faqs.q: Do you offer custom packaging for gift sets?
faqs.a: Yes, we offer several packaging options including custom-printed boxes, drawstring bags, and shrink wrap. You can also choose to have components individually wrapped or bundled together. Let us know your needs and we will provide packaging options and pricing.

heroAltText: Custom gift sets bundles with branded stadium cup, pen, and filefolio arranged in a corporate gift package
